title: Chapter 47
content:
Chapter 47

That was unexpected. It wasn't like Rayla was a slave to pleasure. Just cause we were having sex, I couldn't coerce her into doing my will in exchange for pleasure. No matter what was involved, she always thought of the family first, so even if she was at the height of pleasure, she wouldn't agree with me just to get my D.

So when she agreed with me, it came as a shock, not just to me, but to everyone else as well. Still, no one said a thing. As I explained earlier, in our house, Rayla was the law. Even when they needed me to hunt, Rayla was the only one who put a firm foot down on that suggestion.

Only after she granted the permission was I permitted to go out on a hunt. It was the same in this case as well. I couldn't help but think of various reasons as to why she would agree, but since she already did, I didn't care that much.

And so, the next week, we spent in the inner part of the forest. It was still considered external, but the monsters here were mostly D rank, with rarity being a few C ranks.

Killing them wasn't too difficult for me anymore, but there was one problem that I couldn't deny. The fam couldn't move beyond this point. I still had ways to protect them, but they wouldn't agree with me no matter what I did, so I had no other choice but to resume my dawn hunting. And it wasn't like I was too strong either.

Luckily, I managed to level up to a certain point where I wouldn't be worried much. After all...

[You have killed a D rank monster x236]

[You have gained a D rank mana crystal x236]

[You have gained EXP 263,000]

[You have gained SC 263,000]

[You have killed a C rank monster x9]

[You have gained a C rank mana crystal x 9]

[You have gained EXP 90,000]

[You have gained SC 90,000]

The number of monsters inside this section was too low compared to the outside, but the yield was, of course, higher than the outside. The C rank monsters were a little difficult to kill as well, especially the poison types.

Anyway, I still managed to level up a lot, and even though I was very high on my guard, no B rank monsters showed up. It wasn't just because I was trying to avoid a bothersome fight, but also because I wasn't very confident in winning against one. I needed to be at level 130 at the very least to attempt them, and at level 150 with balanced stats to take care of one. Even then, it wouldn't be an easy fight.

That was because the level of the monsters after C rank would change drastically.

The density of demonic energy in lower-level monsters was limited to a core, but no matter what the world was, there was always one rule that applied to every living being. True solidification began beyond a certain point.

In this case, it would be the C rank. After C rank, the core of a demonic being would fully mature and begin to evolve greatly with each level. That was why C rank monsters were doable even if I were to be at level fifty, but even if I was level fifty, a level equivalent to beginner C rank monsters, it wouldn't be an easy fight.

Anyhoo...

[You have leveled up x31]

[You have obtained 155 stat points]

[EXP 4204\10,300]

[You have passed the 100 level mark]

[Your class would be enhanced]

[All effects would be enhanced by 10%]

[Mana recovery rate has been enhanced by 10%]

I leveled up a lot. Although I didn't manage to get to level 150, which was the main goal in coming here, there were still two whole weeks left, and I could focus on becoming level 150, and take care of at the very least one B rank monster.

There were only three goals to this trip.

Become level 150, train the whole fam to the point they wouldn't be taken lightly anywhere they went, and kill at the very least one B rank monster.

Other than all that, there was another change that I observed in the system, in the form of a blessing was through this leveling up. I leveled up beyond the 100 mark to see if that function would be the same or not, and it turned out to be I was right.

Pleasantly right, actually.

Whenever I would level up in my previous worlds past the one hundred point, or two hundred, and so on, the level-up requirement increment would increase as well. For example, after level 100, instead of increasing only by 100 EXP, the level increment would rise by 1000 EXP, and at the 200 mark, it would be 2000, and so on until all the way up to 4000. Unfortunately, level up beyond 500 was not possible, so the increment stopped at 4000, but it was still an enormous amount considering I couldn't gain EXP from lower-level monsters any longer.

Whew. What complicated chatter. Was the real goal some pussy or what?

So, to focus on that, I decided to deal with the stat points before doing anything else.

[Bonus stats 162]

[Strength: 50]

[Agility: 50]

[Stamina: 50]

[Intelligence: 210]

[Charm: 7]

My charm grew with achievement, but I hadn't added any additional stats to it. And from another point of view, the Intelligence stat was doing enough as it should be. Of course, if I had more MP, I could fill up the mana orbs faster, but I needed to keep everything balanced, and the utmost goal of getting some snatch was being met with the current amount of MP, so there was no strict need to consider it.

Deciding to do so...

[Strength: 100]

[Agility: 100]

[Stamina: 100]

[Intelligence: 220]

[Charm: 9]

[Bonus stats: 0]

With this, I had attained the peak human charm. After hitting ten, my charm face-wise wouldn't increase, but the attraction of my being, such as my smell, my sweat, even the very air around me, would be affected.

And, most importantly, it would affect others as well.

As for the other stats of mine, raising my physical stats was necessary. As I said, my opponents were those who used physical abilities more than magical abilities. To keep up with them, I needed to keep my physical stats well-balanced.

Of course, my main attack force was still magic, but there was something I needed to worry about more before that, so I'd much rather focus on the secondary goals that would lead to my primary goal instead of battles that I could stall.

With this, I was prepared to move on.

So...

[Mana orbs x10]

'Let us begin.'

~~

"Are you all right, brother?" Martha asked as I trained them to the bone. They had gotten used to the previous harsh training, so I had to tweak it a bit to make it harsher.

As to why she was asking me that question. Well, it was because I hadn't slept for the last three weeks. During the day, it was training them, during the night, it was hunting, and finally, the leftover time was to screw the women of this family.

Martha was a must every day, but Rayla and Sandra were used after a day's break. Of course, that didn't mean I didn't molest them every chance I could get. Especially Rayla, fingering her and eating out her pussy while she moaned in heat in front of her husband was a turn-on that was almost equivalent to fucking her.

"I'm just a little tired," I replied.

"Why don't you just sleep?" Martha asked.

While it was nice of her to ask, I couldn't just sleep given my current conditions. I was too far away from leveling up yet to my goal, so I needed to level up to the point that I could at the very least be of some value in the city.

That was correct. There had been a change in plans. If before, I was going to hide in the knight lord's family, now I was going to actively use it, given my value as a second circle mage.

"I'll sleep when we return," I replied. There was time to sleep. There was no time to focus on my goals, though. It wasn't like my sleep-deprived state affected my battles. It did at first, but then I got used to it. There was a time when I had to fight for days and nights without even eating or drinking a drop of water, let alone sleeping.

"I'm worried about you, brother." Martha cutely said. I smiled and rubbed her head before I pulled her closer to me and hugged her, sneaking my hand down her pants.

I cupped her moderate tight ass and fondled it to my heart while she rubbed her head in my chest. With all the plans made, all I needed to do was make sure I could enjoy myself to the fullest while trying my hardest to get over everything.

And soon enough, there will come a time when I will be able to make my fantasy come true.

'Very soon.' I thought as I entered a finger in Martha's pussy.

"Hmm~~~"
